special_abilities.title: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
special_abilities.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.title: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

actions.title: Bite
actions.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

actions.title: Claw
actions.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) slashing damage.

actions.title: Tail
actions.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d8 + 8) bludgeoning damage.

actions.title: Frightful Presence
actions.text: Each creature of the dragon’s choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon’s Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

description.time: 1 minute, effected creatures can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns

actions.title: Fire Breath
actions.text: The dragon exhales fire in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw, taking 63 (18d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

legendary_action.title: Adult Red Dragon Legendary Action
legendary_action.text: The dragon can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature’s turn. The dragon regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.
legendary_action.lore: The odor of sulfur and pumice surrounds a red dragon, whose swept-back horns and spinal frill define its silhouette. Its beaked snout vents smoke at all times, and its eyes dance with flame when it is angry.

legendary_actions.title: Detect
legendary_actions.text: The dragon makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.

legendary_actions.title: Tail AttacK**
legendary_actions.text: The dragon makes a tail attack.

legendary_actions.title: Wing Attack
legendary_actions.text: (Costs 2 Actions). The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw or take 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.

lair_action.title: A Red Dragon’s Lair
lair_action.text: On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the dragon takes a lair action to cause one of the following effects; the dragon can’t use the same effect two rounds in a row:

lair_actions.title: Magma Eruption
lair_actions.text: Magma erupts from a point on the ground the dragon can see within 120 feet of it, creating a 20-foot-high, 5-foot-radius geyser. Each creature in the geyser’s area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

description.reach: within 120 ft. of sight, 20 ft. high, 5 ft. radius

lair_actions.title: Tremor
lair_actions.text: A tremor shakes the lair in a 60-foot radius around the dragon. Each creature other than the dragon on the ground in that area must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone.

lair_actions.title: Volcanic Gases
lair_actions.text: Volcanic gases form a cloud in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point the dragon can see within 120 feet of it. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. It lasts until initiative count 20 on the next round. Each creature that starts its turn in the cloud must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its turn. While poisoned in this way, a creature is incapacitated.

description.reach: within 120 ft. of sight, 20 ft. radius

regional_effect.title: Adult Red Dragon Regional Effects
regional_effect.text: The region containing a legendary red dragon’s lair is warped by the dragon’s magic, which creates one or more of the following effects:

region_effects.title: Earthquake
region_effects.text: Small earthquakes are common within 6 miles of the dragon’s lair

region_effects.title: Water Sources
region_effects.text: Water sources within 1 mile of the lair are supernaturally warm and tainted by sulfur.

region_effects.title: Rocky Fissures
region_effects.text: Rocky fissures within 1 mile of the dragon’s lair form portals to the Elemental Plane of Fire, allowing creatures of elemental fire into the world to dwell nearby.
